original_image_tags: A scanned, aged, off-white paper document, a memorandum from the FBI. The paper has two hole-punch marks at the top edge and shows some wear and creasing.

elements.description: A typed memorandum from J. Edgar Hoover to the Director of Special Investigations, Department of the Air Force, dated February 11, 1953, regarding 'FLYING DISCS'. The document contains a block of typed text, several stamps (including 'RECORDED-84', 'EX-105', 'COMM - FBI FEB 11 1953 MAILED 30', '20 FEB 19 1953'), handwritten annotations in red ink and pencil, and a typed distribution list on the lower left.

judge.reason: Both sides agree the document is a typed memorandum with stamps, but B provides specific quoted stamp text and layout details that A omits, without contradiction.
